reference: Hello, if you have had unprotected intercourse around the fertile period, then you have a very good chance of conception; however, your symptoms are not clearly suggestive of that. Please wait for your next period and take a home pregnancy test with a fresh early morning sample of urine three to seven days later if you miss your period. Otherwise, you can have the serum beta-human chorionic gonadotropin titers tested, coupled with a trans-vaginal ultrasound, and see a specialist for further evaluation of the situation. I hope this helps.
text: Hello. If you have had unprotected intercourse around the fertile period, then you have a very good chance of conception. However, your symptoms are not clearly suggestive of that. Please wait for your next period and take a home pregnancy test with a fresh early morning sample of urine 3 to 7 days later if you miss your period. Otherwise, you can have the serum beta-human chorionic gonadotropin titers tested, coupled with a transvaginal ultrasound, and see a specialist for further evaluation of the situation. I hope this helps.
